data.description: The amount of hit point damage a creature or object takes.

[H1] Casting
1 action
Time:
Range: 30 feet
Components: V, S
Duration:
A magical effect that happens all at once and lasts only until the end of the turn.
A radiant force blasts the target, blindending it.

When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack, until the end of your next turn, that weapon deals an additional 3d8 radiant damage to the target. Additionally, the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the start of your next turn. A blinded creature can repeat the Constitution saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

1action
Time:
Range: feet
Components: V
Duration: 1minute

You attempt to blind or deafen a creature that you see within range. Make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the target is either blinded or deafened (your choice). At the end of each of its turns, the target can make a new Constitution saving throw; on a success, the spell ends.
Teleports you and willing creature of your choice to a place you have seen before. You can see through the creatures eyes during the teleportation.

1action
Time:
Range:
Self
Components: V,S
Duration: minute

Roll a d20 at the end of your turn. On a roll of 11 or higher, you vanish and appear on the Ethereal Plane. The spell fails if the target is already on that plane). At start of your next turn, make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, you take necrotic damage equal to half as much plus any wasted vitality from your turospell. If the target is unoccupied space within 10 feet and you choose a space available, you are transported there. This has no effect on undead constructs or plants. While under the spell's effect, if you see an unoccupied plant or magical object in nearest range, it withers or dies. At Higher Levels: When cast using a spell slot of 5th level or higher, the necrotic damage increases by 5d8 for each slot level above 4th.
An action is a character's activity on their turn in the combat or other kinds of tension.
